docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BALBON, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT HARDING, CLARENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-08-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE TO BE CONTINUED AT 4 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL AFTER AUG. 2010, AT WHICH TIME CASE WILL BE DISMISSED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-05-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUE EVERY 4 MONTHS UNTIL AUGUST 2010. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALBON, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDING, CLARENCE $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER. PARTIES PRESENT IN COURT, NO EVIDENCE RETAINED, NOTHING ON RECORD. CLERK-BETH WILBER, DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BALBON, BRIAN HARDING, CLARENCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-02-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARDING, CLARENCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: SAMUEL FENG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
